title: phalaris truncata
intro: Phalaris truncata, also known as button grass, is a perennial grass native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Phalaris truncata include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, making it a potential treatment for skin conditions and other inflammatory diseases. Phalaris truncata can be prepared in herbal form as a tea or tincture, or used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
